description:
The largest atom in the VR.4 decomp. For non-parking fns:

- Cranelift fn signature reflects entry-param Descrs: `extern "C" fn callee(arg0: i64, arg1: f64, ..., cont_ptr: *mut u8, host_ctx: *mut u8) -> ResultRepr` (exact shape TBD: cont_ptr may be redundant once .6.3 lands).
- Term::Call / TailCall to a non-parking callee emits a native Cranelift `call` inst with the args passed by register, not by frame slots.
- Callee's entry block reads from its block params (Cranelift fn params), not from frame slot loads.
- The result returns via register; the caller picks it up directly.

Parking-reachable callees keep the existing uniform-frame ABI: caller still allocates a frame and writes slots; trampoline still dispatches them. The two ABIs coexist while VR.4 lands.

## Adds

- Per-fn `Signature` computed from FnTypes (mirrors fz-ul4.27.5.2/3 entry-frame slot kinds for the param ABI types).
- Bifurcated emit_call: native call inst for non-parking callees; existing frame-based path for parking-reachable callees.
- Bifurcated compile_fn entry: native param load (block_params[0..N]) for non-parking fns; existing entry-frame load for parking-reachable fns.
- Return ABI: non-parking fns return their result via register; parking-reachable continue to write into cont frame's slot 1.

## Kills

- fz_alloc_frame calls at Term::Call sites whose callee is non-parking. Replaced by Cranelift native call.
- Entry-frame load boilerplate at the top of non-parking fns. Replaced by direct block_param consumption.
- The "every fz_fn_<N> has the uniform signature" invariant — bifurcated based on parking-reachability.

## Acceptance

- The dist / sum3 fixtures (non-parking) lower with no `fz_alloc_frame` at their call sites.
- concurrency_ping_pong (parking) still works — heap frames + trampoline still drive its scheduling.
- Matrix green, full test suite green.

## Depends on

- fz-ul4.27.6.1 (parking-reachability analysis)

## Blocks

- fz-ul4.27.6.3 (inline continuations / native cont calls)
title: VR.4.2: typed sigs + native direct calls for non-parking fns
